The '''''Libra''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It carried the [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] who outfitted the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Ram's Head]]'' with the experimental [[Shield X]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
